videos.title: Sarah Pan, teenage AI wizard
videos.description: Sarah has also written a blog post here: https://www.answer.ai/posts/2025-03-17-gpu-programming-scratch.html
videos.highlights: Sarah Pan demonstrates that teenagers can master complex GPU programming from scratch, creating efficient AI systems without relying on high-level frameworks. Her work highlights the accessibility of low-level hardware optimization for AI development, challenging assumptions about expertise requirements in the field.
videos.worthReading: This video showcases exceptional youth talent in AI while providing practical insights into GPU programming fundamentals that even experienced developers can learn from.
